questions.explanation: DevOps focuses on collaboration, automation, and continuous improvement to increase delivery speed and reliability.

options.A: Increase separation between development and operations teams
options.B: Automate and improve collaboration to deliver software faster and more reliably
options.C: Replace testing with monitoring in production

questions.question: What is the primary goal of DevOps in a software delivery organization?

questions.explanation: git checkout -b <branch> creates the branch and checks it out in one step.
questions.question: Which Git command creates a new branch named "feature/login" and switches to it?

questions.explanation: top provides an interactive, real-time view of processes and system resource usage.
questions.question: On a Linux system, which command is commonly used to view real-time CPU and memory usage interactively?

questions.explanation: A Dockerfile contains instructions (FROM, RUN, COPY, etc.) used to build an image.

options.B: To define how to build a Docker image
options.C: To orchestrate multiple containers across nodes

questions.question: In Docker, what is the purpose of a Dockerfile?

questions.explanation: OIDC federation allows short-lived credentials by assuming an IAM role, avoiding stored long-lived secrets.

options.A: Commit AWS access keys into a private repo and restrict access
options.B: Use OIDC-based federation from the CI system to assume an IAM role
options.C: Base64-encode the credentials and store them in the repo
options.D: Store credentials in a Docker image layer to avoid exposing them in logs

questions.question: In a CI/CD pipeline, which approach best prevents long-lived cloud credentials from being stored in the repository when deploying to AWS?

questions.explanation: A Deployment manages ReplicaSets, ensures desired replica count, and supports rolling updates/rollbacks.
questions.question: Which Kubernetes object is primarily responsible for keeping a specified number of pod replicas running and performing rolling updates?

questions.explanation: Terraform state tracks resource IDs and attributes so Terraform can plan and apply changes correctly.

options.A: To store application runtime logs for debugging
options.B: To define cloud provider pricing and quotas
options.C: To map declared resources to real infrastructure and track metadata for changes
options.D: To encrypt secrets so they can be committed safely to Git

questions.question: In Terraform, what is the main purpose of the state file?

questions.explanation: Vault can generate short-lived dynamic DB credentials and support rotation/renewal without rebuilding images.

options.A: Bake credentials into the Docker image during build time
options.B: Store credentials in Git and mount them as a ConfigMap
options.C: Use Vault dynamic database credentials and have apps fetch/renew them at runtime
options.D: Hardcode credentials in the application source and rely on code reviews

questions.question: You need to rotate database credentials used by multiple Kubernetes services without redeploying application images. Which design best fits this requirement?

questions.explanation: Version/build labels (used carefully) plus deployment annotations enable correlating error spikes with specific releases.

options.A: Increase Prometheus scrape interval to reduce metric noise
options.B: Add a build/version label to metrics and correlate with deployment events in Grafana
options.C: Disable labels to reduce cardinality and make graphs simpler
options.D: Move all metrics to logs and stop using Prometheus

questions.question: A Prometheus alert fires when error rate increases, but you want to quickly identify which service version introduced the regression. Which approach best improves this investigation workflow?

questions.explanation: CPU-bound tasks block Node’s event loop; offloading to worker threads or external workers reduces blocking and improves throughput.

options.A: Replace asynchronous I/O with synchronous file reads for predictability
options.B: Move CPU-heavy work to worker threads or an external job queue/service
options.C: Increase console.log statements to improve observability
options.D: Disable keep-alive on HTTP connections to force new connections

questions.question: Your Node.js API is deployed behind a load balancer and occasionally returns 502 errors under load. You suspect the app is blocking the event loop. Which change is most likely to reduce event-loop blocking?
